requirements.text: The s2s bead's closeout artifacts must be committed to git, reconciling the bead-is-closed-in-DB-but-uncommitted-in-git mismatch
requirements.acceptance: git log --oneline -- '.beads/artifacts/br-omp-backbone-skill-s2s/review-report.md' returns a commit with close: prefix; git status --porcelain shows no untracked s2s files

requirements.text: Dead Python bytecode cache must be removed and prevented from recurring
requirements.acceptance: .omp/scripts/__pycache__/ directory does not exist on disk; grep '__pycache__' .gitignore returns a match; git status --porcelain shows no pycache files

requirements.text: The unpushed commit on main must be pushed to origin
requirements.acceptance: git status --short --branch shows up to date with origin/main with no ahead/behind indicator

requirements.text: The README.md change (npm-release row) must be committed, not left dirty
requirements.acceptance: git status --porcelain README.md returns empty (clean); the change is in a commit

requirements.text: The closeout commit(s) must follow the repo's conventional commit style
requirements.acceptance: Commit message matches pattern close: br-omp-backbone-skill-s2s or chore: for the hygiene items, per the conventions.md Git section

requirements.text: All bead sync state (.br_history, issues.jsonl) must be flushed and committed
requirements.acceptance: br sync --flush-only exits 0; git status --porcelain .beads/ shows no untracked bead state files after commit

success_criteria: git log --oneline -- '.beads/artifacts/br-omp-backbone-skill-s2s/review-report.md' returns a close: commit
git status --porcelain | grep s2s returns empty
git status --short --branch shows no ahead/behind indicator
br sync --flush-only exits 0 with no pending changes
